name: Berlin
blurb: A gritty, unvarnished look at Germany's capital from Cold War scars to world-class techno and cheap street eats.
imageAlt: The iconic Brandenburg Gate illuminated at dusk in central Berlin

name: Potsdam
blurb: A grand playground of Prussian kings, spectacular royal estates, and vast formal gardens located just a short train ride from the capital.
imageAlt: The beautiful terraced vineyards leading up to Sanssouci Palace in Potsdam
